title: zehneria indica
intro: Zehneria indica, also known as Dahlika or Indian spinach, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Cucurbitaceae. It is commonly used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in nutrients and offers several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and aiding in the management of diabetes and hypertension. In herbal preparations, Zehneria indica is often used as a dried leaf powder or decoction, and it can also be consumed as a juice or added to salads for its nutritional value.
